question: The shippers package hazardous materials, they must certify that this was done according to the regulations. The only exception is when:
canonical_answer:
a. The driver is given a sealed cargo compartment.
b. The shipment is a hazardous waste.
c. The shipper is a private carrier carrying his or her own product.
d. All of the above.

C

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: The shipper is a private carrier carrying his or her own product

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice
appears_in.answer: The shipper is a private carrier carrying his or her own product

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Tests
appears_in.answer: The shipper is a private carrier carrying his or her own product

appears_in.title: Hazmat Pratice Test
appears_in.answer: The shipper is a private carrier carrying his or her own product
